__comment: Example tools-config.json for UMAF. Copy to tools-config.json and customize.
__comment__: Each pipeline key maps role names to allowed tool lists. Role names match case-insensitively against the ToolRegistry classmethod suffixes (e.g. 'worker' matches research_worker_tools AND coderpp_worker_tools). Available tool names: read_file, write_file, write_lines, run_command, call_claude, web_search, web_fetch, download_file.
__comment_timeouts__: Optional __timeouts__ key overrides per-tool timeouts in seconds. Omitted tools keep their defaults: call_claude=120, run_command=30, web_fetch=20, web_search=15, download_file=30.

__global__.__comment__: Applied to ALL pipelines unless overridden by a pipeline-specific section.
